title: Kuwait expels 2 Iranian embassy staff — 24-hour departure demand; protest note to Iran charge d'affaires; 30 BMs/drones detected
snippet: Kuwait expelled 2 Iranian embassy staff and demanded their departure within 24 hours. A protest note was handed to the Iran charge d'affaires. Kuwait detected 30 ballistic missiles and drones in the June 3 attack on Kuwait International Airport. Kuwait Airways has resumed operations from a different terminal.
tag_reason: 쿠웨이트의 이란 외교관 추방은 이전 보도에 없는 신규 외교적 조치. 6/3 공항 공격(src-1561)의 후속이나 외교적 대응이라는 유의미한 새 정보
